admire.example: I admire my mother for her patience and kindness.
admire.exampleCn: 我钦佩我母亲的耐心和善良。

tie.example: He wears a red tie to every important meeting.
tie.exampleCn: 他每次重要会议都戴一条红色领带。

haunted.example: The old house on the hill looks haunted at night.
haunted.exampleCn: 山上的那座老房子晚上看起来闹鬼。

treat.example: My parents always treat guests with warm tea and smiles.
treat.exampleCn: 我父母总是用热茶和微笑款待客人。

fool.example: Only a fool would give up on a true friend.
fool.exampleCn: 只有傻瓜才会放弃一个真正的朋友。

business.example: Honesty is the foundation of any successful business.
business.exampleCn: 诚实是任何成功商业的基础。

punish.example: The law should punish bad behavior but also teach lessons.
punish.exampleCn: 法律应该惩罚不良行为，但也要起到教育作用。

present.example: The best present you can give is your time and attention.
present.exampleCn: 你能给的最好礼物是你的时间和关注。

warmth.example: The warmth of family makes winter feel like spring.
warmth.exampleCn: 家庭的温暖让冬天感觉像春天。

spread.example: Good news spreads faster than wildfire in our village.
spread.exampleCn: 好消息在我们村里传播得比野火还快。

eat out.example: We sometimes eat out to try different local foods.
eat out.exampleCn: 我们有时出去吃饭，尝试不同的当地美食。

put on five pounds.example: During the holiday, I always put on five pounds easily.
put on five pounds.exampleCn: 假期期间，我总是容易增重五磅。

be similar to.example: My new classmate is similar to me in many ways.
be similar to.exampleCn: 我的新同学在很多方面与我相似。

wash away.example: The heavy rain will wash away the dust on the road.
wash away.exampleCn: 大雨会冲走路上的灰尘。

wash away bad things.example: People believe water can wash away bad things from the past year.
wash away bad things.exampleCn: 人们相信水可以洗去过去一年的坏运气。

a time for cleaning.example: Spring Festival is a time for cleaning and fresh starts.
a time for cleaning.exampleCn: 春节是打扫卫生和重新开始的时候。

in the shape of.example: The mooncake was in the shape of a beautiful flower.
in the shape of.exampleCn: 那块月饼呈美丽的花朵形状。

a traditional folk story.example: Grandma loves telling us a traditional folk story before bed.
a traditional folk story.exampleCn: 奶奶喜欢在睡前给我们讲传统的民间故事。

the most touching.example: The letter from my father was the most touching gift I received.
the most touching.exampleCn: 父亲的信是我收到的最感人的礼物。

lay out.example: We lay out the food on the table before the guests arrive.
lay out.exampleCn: 我们在客人到来之前把食物摆在桌上。

share sth. with sb.example: True friends are happy to share joy and sorrow with each other.
share sth. with sb.exampleCn: 真正的朋友乐于彼此分享快乐和悲伤。

Mother's Day.example: On Mother's Day, I cooked a special meal for my mom.
Mother's Day.exampleCn: 母亲节那天，我为妈妈做了一顿特别的饭。

become more and more popular.example: Online learning has become more and more popular among students.
become more and more popular.exampleCn: 在线学习在学生中变得越来越流行。

show our love.example: Small daily actions show our love better than big words.
show our love.exampleCn: 日常的小行动比大话更能表达我们的爱。

sound like.example: That sounds like a great plan for the weekend hike.
sound like.exampleCn: 那听起来像是周末徒步的好计划。

the hottest month of the.example: July is usually the hottest month of the year in Yunnan.
the hottest month of the.exampleCn: 七月通常是云南一年中最热的月份。

carry wishes to sb.example: The river carries wishes to those who live far away.
carry wishes to sb.exampleCn: 这条河把祝福带给那些住在远方的人。

shoot down.example: The hero shot down the monster in the ancient legend.
shoot down.exampleCn: 英雄在古代传说中射下了怪物。

refuse to do sth.example: We should refuse to do anything that hurts others.
refuse to do sth.exampleCn: 我们应该拒绝做任何伤害他人的事情。

fly up to the moon.example: In the story, Chang'e flew up to the moon alone.
fly up to the moon.exampleCn: 在故事中，嫦娥独自飞上了月亮。

the tradition of admiring the.example: The tradition of admiring the moon brings families together.
the tradition of admiring the.exampleCn: 赏月的传统让家人团聚在一起。

as a result.example: I practiced every day; as a result, my English improved greatly.
as a result.exampleCn: 我每天练习，因此我的英语进步很大。

on the second Sunday of.example: Mother's Day falls on the second Sunday of May each year.
on the second Sunday of.exampleCn: 母亲节在每年五月的第二个星期日。

dress up as.example: The children love to dress up as their favorite heroes.
dress up as.exampleCn: 孩子们喜欢打扮成他们最喜欢的英雄。

play a trick on sb.example: On April Fool's Day, my brother played a trick on me.
play a trick on sb.exampleCn: 愚人节那天，我哥哥和我开了个玩笑。

the true meaning of.example: The true meaning of friendship is being there in hard times.
the true meaning of.exampleCn: 友谊的真正意义是在困难时刻陪伴在身边。

the spirit of.example: The spirit of teamwork helped us win the basketball game.
the spirit of.exampleCn: 团队合作的精神帮助我们赢得了篮球比赛。

care about.example: Real friends care about each other's feelings.
care about.exampleCn: 真正的朋友在乎彼此的感受。

make more money.example: Working hard is the honest way to make more money.
make more money.exampleCn: 努力工作是挣更多钱的诚实方式。

give out.example: The teacher asked us to give out the books to everyone.
give out.exampleCn: 老师让我们把书分发给每个人。

used to do sth.example: I used to do sth like climbing hills every weekend when I was young.
used to do sth.exampleCn: 我小时候每个周末都常去爬山。

warn sb.example: The sign warns sb not to swim in the deep water.
warn sb.exampleCn: 告示牌警告某人不要在深水中游泳。

end up.example: If you keep practicing, you will end up a great musician.
end up.exampleCn: 如果你坚持练习，你最终会成为一名伟大的音乐家。

remind sb. of sth.example: This photo reminds me of my childhood in the countryside.
remind sb. of sth.exampleCn: 这张照片让我想起了我在农村的童年。

wake up.example: I wake up early every morning to read English aloud.
wake up.exampleCn: 我每天早上早起大声朗读英语。

the next morning.example: The next morning, we continued our journey to the mountain top.
the next morning.exampleCn: 第二天早上，我们继续向山顶进发。

promise to do sth.example: I promise to do sth helpful for my community every month.
promise to do sth.exampleCn: 我许诺每月为社区做一些有益的事情。

spread love and joy everywhere.example: A kind word can spread love and joy everywhere around us.
spread love and joy everywhere.exampleCn: 一句友善的话可以在我们周围到处传播爱和欢乐。

the beginning of new life.example: Spring represents the beginning of new life in nature.
the beginning of new life.exampleCn: 春天代表着大自然中新生命的开始。

give birth to.example: The old tree gives birth to hundreds of new leaves each spring.
give birth to.exampleCn: 这棵老树每年春天长出数百片新叶。

not only... but also.example: Reading not only opens minds but also enriches the soul.
not only... but also.exampleCn: 阅读不但开阔思维，而且丰富灵魂。

a symbol of new life.example: The green leaf is a symbol of new life and fresh hope.
a symbol of new life.exampleCn: 绿叶是新生命和新鲜希望的象征。

trick or treat.example: Children shout trick or treat when they visit houses on Halloween.
trick or treat.exampleCn: 万圣节时，孩子们拜访每家每户时大喊不给糖就捣蛋。

learn about.example: Traveling helps us learn about different cultures and people.
learn about.exampleCn: 旅行帮助我们了解不同的文化和人们。

the importance of.example: Teachers always stress the importance of hard work.
the importance of.exampleCn: 老师们总是强调努力学习的重要性。

a novel written by.example: I am reading a novel written by a famous Chinese author.
a novel written by.exampleCn: 我正在读一位著名中国作家写的一本小说。
